98.reason: [The program only implements DFS traversal and completely omits BFS traversal, violating the problem requirement to output both DFS and BFS sequences before and after vertex deletion. Additionally, the traversal always starts from the smallest unvisited vertex instead of always starting from vertex 0 as required.]
